fields.Description: The ID of the user that created this page.

fields.Description: Indicates whether the page is currently published.

fields.Description: Custom HTML for embed codes, javascript, etc. that goes in the <head> tag of the page.

fields.Name: htmlTitle
fields.Description: The html title of this page.

fields.Description: The unique ID of the page.

fields.Name: metaDescription
fields.Description: A description that goes in <meta> tag on the page.

fields.Name: name
fields.Description: The internal name of the page.

fields.Name: pageExpiryDate
fields.Description: The date at which this page should expire and begin redirecting to another url or page.

fields.Name: pageExpiryEnabled
fields.Description: Boolean describing if the page expiration feature is enabled for this page

fields.Name: pageExpiryRedirectId
fields.Description: The ID of another page this page's url should redirect to once this page expires. Should only set this or pageExpiryRedirectUrl.

fields.Name: pageExpiryRedirectUrl
fields.Description: The URL this page's url should redirect to once this page expires. Should only set this or pageExpiryRedirectId.

fields.Name: pageRedirected
fields.Description: A generated Boolean describing whether or not this page is currently expired and being redirected.

fields.Name: password
fields.Description: Set this to create a password protected page. Entering the password will be required to view the page.

fields.Name: publicAccessRules
fields.Description: Rules for require member registration to access private content.

fields.Name: publicAccessRulesEnabled
fields.Description: Boolean to determine whether or not to respect publicAccessRules.

fields.Name: publishDate
fields.Description: The date (ISO8601 format) the page is to be published at.

fields.Description: Set this to true if you want to be published immediately when the schedule publish endpoint is called, and to ignore the publish_date setting.

fields.Description: The path of the this page. This field is appended to the domain to construct the url of this page.

fields.Name: state
fields.Description: An ENUM descibing the current state of this page.

fields.Name: subcategory
fields.Description: Details the type of page this is. Should always be landing_page or site_page

fields.Name: templatePath
fields.Description: String detailing the path of the template used for this page.

fields.Name: themeSettingsValues
fields.Description: A collection of settings specific to the theme applied to the page.

fields.Name: translatedFromId
fields.Description: ID of the primary page this object was translated from.

fields.Name: translations
fields.Description: A map of translations for the page, each associated with a specific language variation.

fields.Name: updated
fields.Description: The timestamp indicating when the page was last updated.

fields.Description: The ID of the user that updated this page.

fields.Name: url
fields.Description: A generated field representing the URL of this page.

fields.Description: Boolean to determine if this page should use a featuredImage.

fields.Description: A data structure containing the data for all the modules inside the containers for this page. This will only be populated if the page has widget containers.

fields.Description: A data structure containing the data for all the modules for this page.

fields.Name: CRM.CrmOwners.owners
fields.Description:
HubSpot uses **owners** to assign CRM objects to specific people in your organization. The endpoints described here are used to get a list of the owners that are available for an account. To assign an owner to an object, set the hubspot_owner_id property using the appropriate CRM object update or create a request.

If teams are available for your HubSpot tier, these endpoints will also indicate which team(s) an owner can access, as well as which team is the owner's primary team.

fields.Name: archived
fields.Description: Indicates whether the owner is archived.

fields.Name: createdAt
fields.Description: The date and time when the owner was created.

fields.Name: email
fields.Description: The email address of the owner.

fields.Name: firstName
fields.Description: The first name of the owner.

fields.Name: id
fields.Description: The unique identifier of the owner.

fields.Name: lastName
fields.Description: The last name of the owner.

fields.Name: type
fields.Description: The type of the owner, which can be either PERSON or QUEUE.

fields.Name: updatedAt
fields.Description: The date and time when the owner was last updated.

fields.Name: userId
fields.Description: The user ID of the owner.

fields.Name: userIdIncludingInactive
fields.Description: The user ID of the owner, including inactive users.

Pipelines represent distinct stages in a workflow, like closing a deal or servicing a support ticket. These endpoints provide access to read and modify pipelines in HubSpot. Pipelines support `deals` and `tickets` object types.

## Pipeline ID validation

When calling endpoints that take pipelineId as a parameter, that ID must correspond to an existing, un-archived pipeline. Otherwise the request will fail with a `404 Not Found` response.

fields.Name: CRM.PublicAppCrmCards.sample-response
fields.DisplayName: Public App Crm Cards - Sample Response
fields.Description: Allows an app to extend the CRM UI by surfacing custom cards in the sidebar of record pages. These cards are defined up-front as part of app configuration, then populated by external data fetch requests when the record page is accessed by a user.

fields.Name: allItemsLinkUrl
fields.Description: URL to a page the integrator has built that displays all details for this card. This URL will be displayed to users under a `See more [x]` link if there are more than five items in your response, where `[x]` is the value of `itemLabel`.

fields.Name: cardLabel
fields.Description: The label to be used for the `allItemsLinkUrl` link (e.g. 'See more tickets'). If not provided, this falls back to the card's title.

fields.Name: responseVersion
fields.Description: The number version of the response.

fields.Name: sections
fields.Description: A list of up to five valid card sub categories.

fields.Name: totalCount
fields.Description: The total number of card properties that will be sent in this response.

fields.Name: tokens
fields.Description: A collection of token keys and values associated with the template tokens.

fields.Name: utk
fields.Description: Use the `utk` parameter to associate an event with a contact by `usertoken`. This is recommended if you don't know a user's email, but have an identifying user token in your cookie.
